prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-TT-11PCKTTOOLBELT-TAN Product Type: TOOL_BELT Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 11 Pocket Leather Tool Belt for DIY Woodworking Electrician Tools Contractor Bags, Tan Brown Description: Featuring top grain leather fabrication, easy waist belt adjustments and 11 pockets for primary and secondary tool storage, this leather tool belt is heavy duty, made to be used and can handle any job you throw its way.

This heavy duty leather tool belt comes with x2 large front pockets (9.5 x 7.5 inches), x2 smaller front pockets (7 x 5 inches), x1 tape measure holder (7 x 5 inches), x2 hammer holds (one fixed and one swivel) and x6 smaller pockets, it's capable of carrying the majority of your most valuable and useful tools, eliminating multiple trips back to the shop, tool box or truck.

Made from top grain leather with double rivets and reinforced stitching, this leather tool belt is of high quality and fabricated from quality materials; the tool belt will be stiff upon arrival but will soften and relax with use and time. The belt is also leather, measuring two inches wide with double metal needles; 23 different size adjustments are built in with a little bit of room for additional leather punches if needed. Waist size is adjustable between 36 and 50 inches approximately.

This heavy tool belt from ToolTreaux has a wide application range. It's suitable for DIY at home, construction, electrical work, carpentry, woodworking, framing and building, for plumbers, contractors and more; it also makes great gifts for men, Dad gifts, husbands, brothers and boyfriends.

With ample space for tools, including deep pockets for nail and screws, a tape measure, pencil holders, hammer loops and more, this large capacity tool belt will give you more than sufficient access to and storage of tools, so you can focus on the job at hand.

Please Note: the tool belt is not customizable or able to be personalized Search Terms: electrician tool belt carpenter tools tool belt for women wood working tools and equipment tool box construction accessories men welding painting supplies hammer gifts for men dad gifts fathers day gifts for husband gifts for brother boyfriend gifts Features: - 11 POCKET LEATHER TOOL BELT: This leather tool belt can handle any job! It features x4 large front pockets, x1 tape measure holder, x2 hammer holds and x6 smaller pockets, capable of carrying the majority of your most useful tools and eliminating multiple trips back to the shop, tool box or truck - ADJUSTABLE TOOL BELT: The 2 inch wide leather belt with double metal needles comes with 23 different size adjustments built in with a little bit of room for additional leather punches if needed; waist size is adjustable between 36 and 50 inches - QUALITY LEATHER FABRICATION: Made from top grain leather with double rivets and reinforced stitching, this leather tool belt is made to be used and is of high quality; the tool belt will be stiff upon arrival but will soften and relax with use and time - WIDE APPLICATION: This heavy tool belt from ToolTreaux is suitable for DIY at home, construction, electrical work, carpentry, wood working, framing and building, for plumbers, contractors and more; great gifts for men, Dad gifts, husbands, brothers and boyfriends - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 23 x 10 x 4 inches; Color: Tan Brown; Material: Leather; Weight: 3 === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 11 Pocket Tan Leather Tool Belt

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux Tan Brown Leather Tool Belt

anthropic.title_differentiation: Top Grain Leather, 11 Pockets, Adjustable 36-50 Inch Waist, Heavy Duty, Carpenter And Electrician

openai.title_differentiation: 11 Pockets, Adjustable 36 To 50 Inch Waist, Top Grain Leather, Double Rivets, Reinforced Stitching, Hammer Loops
